message:
test(fuzz): add MeshSessionAck transcript + cross-binding fuzz target (resolves v7kae)

MeshSessionAck::verify (session.rs:445-459) runs THREE distinct gates:
- AckHelloMismatch: ack.from must equal hello.to AND ack.to must equal
  hello.from (cross-binding)
- verify_ack_suite_against_floor: ack.suite must be in hello.suites and
  >= MINIMUM_SUITE
- InvalidSignature: Ed25519 over transcript that includes hello.eph_pubkey
  + hello.nonce — closing the responder-side hello-eph swap-in surface

Existing coverage: hello_transcript_binding (41uql) is the initiator
side; verify_cookie (674lv) is the cookie HMAC; session_metamorphic is
per-frame. NOT covered: MeshSessionAck's three-gate verification.

Eight properties:
- round-trip sign(hello, key) → verify(hello, pubkey) Ok
- AckHelloMismatch on swapped ack.to (cross-binding gate fires before
  signature path)
- per-field binding (ack-side) with no-op-mutation guard
- hello-eph-swap rejection: ack signed with hello1 MUST NOT verify with
  hello2 differing only in hello.eph_pubkey
- hello-nonce-swap rejection
- MissingSignature on unsigned
- wrong-key rejection

Once-gated regression anchors:
- (a) ack.from != hello.to MUST yield AckHelloMismatch (cross-binding
  gate at session.rs:450)
- (b) hello-eph-swap MUST yield InvalidSignature (transcript binding at
  session.rs:422 — responder-side swap-in guard)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
